sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n17240" key="a)tru/fhtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀτρύφητος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">τρῠφάω</etym>) <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> foreg., <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.10b</biblScope> </bibl> (s. v. l.); cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀτύφωτος.</foreign> </entryFree>
